tagline: Technical Marine Contracting Co - Your trusted marine contracting partner in Saudi Arabia.
heroSubtitle: TMS is one of the leading companies in the KSA market in protective coatings, abrasive blasting, onshore & offshore works, corrosion protection, thermal insulation, and equipment maintenance.
heroSupportingText: We provide integrated marine contracting services across Saudi Arabia, specializing in maintenance, protection, and safety for ships and industrial facilities.
aboutDescription: Technical Marine Contracting Co provides comprehensive marine and industrial contracting services, including protective coatings, corrosion protection, thermal insulation, and equipment maintenance in Saudi Arabia.
metaTitle: Technical Marine Contracting Co | Marine Contracting Company in Saudi Arabia
metaDescription: Technical Marine Contracting Co provides marine contracting services in Saudi Arabia including protective coatings, corrosion protection, thermal insulation and equipment maintenance.
